questionHtml:
The rate equation for a reaction is:

rate = k[A][B]

Which mechanism is consistent with this rate equation?


A.  2A ⇌ I       Fast
     I + B → P    Slow

B.  A + B ⇌ I   Fast
     I + A → P    Slow

C.  A → I          Slow
     I + B → P    Fast

D.  B ⇌ I         Fast
     I + A → P    Slow

meta.title: The rate equation for a reaction is: rate = k[A][B] Which mechanism is consistent with this rate equation? A. 2A ⇌ I Fast I + B → P Slow B. A + B ⇌ I Fast I + A → P Slow C. A → I S
